title: Saury Hitsumabushi After the Loneliness
overview: In a lonely city where all the inhabitants have been erased by mysterious machines, Renge encounters a team of girls who have been fighting the machines. She cooks them a meal.

title: Canned Mackerel Italian-style Tomato Hot Pot Together
overview: Now that Renge has joined the group's ranks with her powerful weapon, Yuri feels capable of confronting the Goliath, a huge machine, and continuing to advance.

title: Unforgettable Canned Crab and Canned Mackerel Chirashi Sushi
overview: With Yuri having passed away, the team must decide what to do next. The photos being posted on social media may offer a clue.

title: Rich and Warm Corn Beef Miso Ramen
overview: A sudden snowstorm forces the girls to take refuge in a school.

title: Wishing On Mackerel, Oyster, and Egg Zosui Soup Kuzushi Kiritampo Style
overview: The relationship between Erika and Hinageshi becomes strained. A duel between the big sister and the gamer begins.

title: Pool Videos, Summer and Shanghai-style Squid Yakisoba
overview: The team makes videos by the pool to prove on social media that they are humans.

title: Fighting Together for Shio Musubi
overview: The team fights a large group of Wild Hunt threatening what appears to be Citron's group.

title: Chocolate Bars Once the Rain Stops
overview: Renge meets Suzuran and discovers that she may not be who -- or what -- she thinks she is.

title: Laughed All Night and Put Lots of Secret Ingredients in a Surprisingly Tasty Curry
overview: Suzuran's group prepares to move to Citron's settlement.

title: One More and a Missing Can
overview: The team chase Yuri into a station and discover more than they can wrap their head around.

title: Cooking Together With the Untouchable Girl
overview: Hinageshi hacks the facility's AI, forcing it to explain its role.

title: Such A Fun Full-Course Meal
overview: Balor approaches. It's up to the copies -- and Renge -- to protect the survivors.

title: Ending on an Ochazuke Buffet with Everyone Around
overview: The girls continued their fierce battle in "Everyone's Ochazuke Buffet."
